homepage.title:
Free Udemy Courses
Automation | Udemy Enroller by Madhu Dadi
homepage.description:
Automate your learning with 100% off free Udemy
courses. Our engine monitors coupon sites and enrolls you automatically. Stop
hunting for codes.
h2: Bridging the gap between expensive education and free access.
Everything you need to learn for free
Up and running in under 2 minutes
h3: Fully Automated Engine
100% Secure Authentication
Smart Course Filters
Track Your Savings
How It Works

faq.title:
Frequently Asked Questions
- Udemy Enroller Automation Tool
faq.description:
Answers to
common questions about the Udemy Enroller automation tool: how it works, security,
privacy, filters, Cookie vs Email login, coupon accuracy, and free Udemy courses.
h3:
How does the automated Udemy course enroller
                                work?
Which coupon aggregator sites does it monitor?

How fast does enrollment happen after a coupon
                                is posted?
Does the tool work 24/7 without me being online?

Can I just view the coupons without automating
                                my account?
Is this project affiliated with or endorsed by Udemy?
Is it safe to connect my Udemy account?

Does the tool store my email or password
                                anywhere?
What data does the tool collect about me?

What is the difference between Email Login and
                                Cookie Login?

I got a CSRF error with Email Login. What do I
                                do?

How do I extract my Udemy cookies for Cookie
                                Login?

How long do my session cookies last before I
                                need to refresh them?

Can I filter which courses are automatically
                                enrolled?

Can I exclude courses from a specific
                                instructor?

Will it enroll me in courses outside my
                                preferred language?

about.title:
About the Automated Udemy
Enroller Tool by Madhu Dadi
about.description:
Learn about the Udemy
Enroller project - an open-source FastAPI automation tool built by Madhu Dadi to help
learners automatically discover and claim 100% off Udemy courses.
h2: Ready to start learning for free?
h3: Open Source First
Privacy by Design
Free Forever
Community Driven

How to Get Free Udemy
Courses: Step-by-Step Guides
guides.description:
Step-by-step guides for the Udemy Enroller automation tool: learn how to
connect your Udemy account, extract cookies, configure smart filters, deploy
on a server, and automatically enroll in 100% off courses.

privacy.title:
Privacy Policy - Udemy
Enroller Automation Tool
privacy.description: Udemy Enroller privacy policy: encrypted session cookies (Fernet), no password storage, no third-party data transmission. Fully open-source and transparent.
